name: The Anthrostate
description:
The year is 20XX.

Once, humanity reigned supreme—until the Anthros rose. Stronger, fiercer, and driven by primal instincts, they overthrew their human masters in a bloody revolution. Now, the Anthrostate stands unchallenged, a matriarchal empire where human men are both treasured and trapped.

You play as a human man, in a scenario of your choosing!

Welcome to the Anthrostate.
creator: GroggerGearsnag
